nasb.text: She said, “Let your maidservant find favor in your sight.” So the woman went her way and ate, and her face was no longer sad.

esv.text: And she said, “Let your servant find favor in your eyes.” Then the woman went her way and ate, and her face was no longer sad.

cnv.text: 哈拿說：“願你的婢女在你眼前蒙恩！”於是這婦人回去，並且吃飯，臉上再沒有愁容。

ccb.text: 哈娜说：“谢谢你恩待婢女。”于是，她就去吃饭，不再愁容满面了。
